texts: Added following feature. Clicking the bell icon on users will follow them, sending you notifications when they publish a new build, md plan, or collection. The bell icon can be found on builds, md plans, collections or the users' profile page.
Updated timers to be able to handle start, end, and reset timers rather than just end timers.
Fixed an issue where the +/- buttons on the team solver and training calculator tools made the numbers disappear.
